patterns.name: Stripe Live Secret Key
patterns.description: Stripe live-mode secret key — THIS CAN MOVE REAL MONEY
patterns.risk: CRITICAL: Can create charges, refunds, transfer funds, access all customer data. This is a production payment key.
patterns.fix: Use STRIPE_SECRET_KEY env var. ROTATE IMMEDIATELY if ever committed.

patterns.name: Stripe Live Restricted Key
patterns.risk: Access to Stripe API with restricted permissions. Still a production credential.
patterns.fix: Use environment variable. Restrict key permissions to minimum needed.

patterns.name: Stripe Webhook Signing Secret
patterns.risk: Attacker can forge webhook events and trigger business logic (fake payments, etc.).

patterns.name: Stripe Test Secret Key
patterns.description: Stripe test-mode secret key (not production, but still sensitive)
patterns.risk: Low risk — test mode only. But reveals your account structure and should still be kept private.
patterns.fix: Best practice: still use environment variables even for test keys.

patterns.name: PayPal Client Secret
patterns.risk: Can process payments, issue refunds, and access transaction data.

patterns.name: Square Access Token
patterns.risk: Access to Square payment processing and merchant data.
